2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function called fsnotify_modify_mark_mask() to the Linux kernel's vfs (Virtual File System) module. The function allows callers to modify an existing mark's mask by setting and clearing specific bits, and it also updates the associated connector if necessary. This is done to support NFSd's need to modify directory delegation settings on existing marks. The patch includes a new exported function in fs/notify/mark.c and adds a reference to this function in include/linux/fsnotify_backend.h.
